comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text:
✨ Which moment stayed with you the most — the cliffs, the music, or something quieter in between? Let us know your rating out of 10.
🌎 Tell us where you're watching from. It’s always fascinating to see how far these stories travel.
🎥 If this journey meant something to you, you can support us by subscribing or sharing it with a fellow explorer. Every bit of support helps us bring more places like this to life.
Thanks for traveling with us.

comments.author: @Belvie27
comments.text: AS an Irish person it’s painful to listen to the mispronunciation of the cities and places good lord

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: I sincerely apologize for the mispronunciations! 🇮🇪 Irish names are incredibly beautiful but quite challenging for me to get right. I’m still learning and will definitely try to improve. Thank you for pointing it out, and I hope you’ll stay with the channel to help me learn more! ❤🙏

comments.author: @davidkim7506
comments.text: 저 키면 싸우다 다 죽고 제일 찌질한 놈만 남은 모양샌데....

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Thank you for sharing your thoughts! Every place has its own unique history and people that make it special. 🌍 Hope you still found the landscapes interesting. Please keep supporting the channel for more journeys! 🙏✨

comments.author: @LynnGrant-t9l
comments.text:
My great parents lived on that land before this building was built she was born 1902 lived on a alley st I’ve read 12 house they lived at 18 bosses garden 
Does anyone remember this street before the houses were torn down to build Amex house

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Thank you so much for sharing such a precious piece of family history! It’s incredible to think about your great-grandparents living there since 1902. Stories like yours make these locations feel so much more alive beyond the modern buildings. I hope someone in the community remembers Bosses Garden and can share more with you! Please keep supporting the channel for more journeys through history! ❤🇮🇪

comments.author: @剛藤田-w2z
comments.text:
また、行きたくなります。
ありがとうございます。

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: ありがとうございます！そう言っていただけて本当に嬉しいです。ぜひまた訪れてみてくださいね。これからも応援よろしくお願いします！✨
